TITLE: Project simulator
SIGN_IN_modal_terms: I agree to the terms of service
SIGN_IN_modal_email_error: Please submit your e-mail to use the service.
SIGN_IN_modal_terms_error: You need to accept the terms of service.
SIGN_IN_modal_function_CEO_SM: management of small and medium enterprise
MAIN_confirmation_description: Are you sure you want to abandon and proceed?
GAME-OVER-FAILED_modal_content: Due to a large delay the project was cancelled before completion.
GAME-OVER-modal_content: Congratulations! You managed to accomplish the project.
GAME_risk_no_counter: Unfortunately you did not purchase a counteraction for this occasion.
GAME_risk_counter: Fortunately you had purchased a counteraction:
PLAN_save_confirmation_title: Do you really want to save?
PLAN_save_confirmation_description: You already have a saved solution for this scenario. Saving again will overwrite the previous solution.
SIMULATION_reset_confirm: All progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to start over?
SIMULATION_resource_overloaded: Overloaded — resource assigned to multiple tasks (multitasking)
SIMULATION_resource_unallocated: Idle — not working on an active task. Drag onto a Gantt task to assign.
SIMULATION_unallocated_resources_alert: One or more team members are idle (unassigned, waiting, or finished their last task). Assign them on the Gantt below.
SIMULATION_multitasking_resources_alert: One or more team members are on several active tasks at once (multitasking). This reduces output — reassign on the Gantt below if you can.
RANKING_empty: No scores yet. Be the first!
WELCOME_heading: Welcome to the Octigo project simulator
WELCOME_goal_p: The simulator lets you step into the role of a project manager in a safe environment: plan tasks, assign the team, handle risks and deliver the project on time and on budget. It teaches a practical approach to project management and the Earned Value method (PV, EV, AC, SPI, CPI) through live, evolving scenarios.
WELCOME_feature_planning_desc: Set task start/end dates, effort, and assign resources.
WELCOME_feature_risk_desc: Purchase counteractions to mitigate random risk events during execution.
WELCOME_feature_realtime_desc: Run the simulation, watch the Gantt and task progress, and react to resource overloads (multitasking) and crashing effects.
WELCOME_feature_evm_desc: Track PV / EV / AC on a live chart, with SPI and CPI indicators for schedule and cost performance.
WELCOME_feature_summary_desc: At the end see delivered scope, actual cost, finish date and a score.
WELCOME_feature_ranking_desc: Compare your tournament results against other players.
WELCOME_feature_modes_desc: Lessons with a case study, tournaments on shared scenarios, and random mode with three difficulty levels.
WELCOME_modes_p: Below you can select one of three game modes. In lesson mode you can start your lesson with a case study, then plan and implement it. In tournament mode you can choose one of the already planned projects and implement it, and then compare your results to others in the ranking. In random project mode, the simulator will generate a random project for you on one of the three difficulty levels.
